string.text: Zombie spawn location
Do not let zombies near the stalkers on the roof.
You must cover the stalkers on the roof while they work with the valve installation. Do not let zombies near this repair team.
Zombie spawn location
Do not let zombies near the stalkers in the hangar.
You must cover the stalkers in the hangar while they work with the valve installation. Do not let zombies near this repair team.
Defend the scientists' base
Defend the scientists' base
Defend the scientists' base
During the zombie attack, the scientists' bunker doors are locked. You need to repel the zombie attack to enter the bunker.
Talk to Sakharyov
You need to reach the base and talk to Professor Sakharyov.
Clarify position
Clarify position with the group leader
Clarify position with the group leader
Do not let the repair team perish
Hold your position!
Hold your position!
Take documents to Sakharyov
Take documents to Sakharyov
Take the documents to Sakharyov. They may explain the cause of the strong psi-radiation on the Yantar.
Break through to the installation
Break through to the complex territory

The outskirts of the complex are crawling with zombies. Together with the Lefsha group, you need to break through to its territory. You must hurry: the psi-radiation level could reach a critical level at any moment.
Find the documents
Find the PDA with the documents

A group of stalkers found important documents on the complex's territory that may help Sakharyov figure out the cause of the powerful psi-radiation on Yantar. The group's signal was lost as they exited the complex. You need to find the PDA with the documents.
Meet with Lefsha
Meet with Lefsha's squad
The stalker group is preparing to break into the complex during the decline of psi-radiation levels. You need to meet with the squad commander, Lefsha.
Take position on the hangar roof
Follow the stalker to the roof of the hangar.
Lefsha has ordered everyone to take positions. You need to follow the stalker to the roof to your position.
Bring the "Little Flower"

Help me, mercenary. There's an artifact in the Zone we call "Little Flower". It's useless for stalkers... but women love it so much that any woman would dream of having such a souvenir. With such a gift, any woman will fall for you. I have a date coming up soon, and I desperately need that "Little Flower", that's why I'm still here in the Zone, it was recently seen here. This artifact looks like a magical flower, it glows day and night. Get me that artifact, and I’ll reward you!
Return the souvenir grenade

Mercenary, I need something... I lost a souvenir, it looks like a grenade... but it's not a real grenade... it's a training grenade... Anyway, bring it back to me... When I was roaming the factory grounds, there was a huge explosion... my mind got scrambled, and I almost forgot who I was... I only came to my senses here, and the grenade is probably still there. Bring it back to me.
